title: Do credible people actually believe in UFOs?
summary: This appears to be a short promotional clip or compilation discussing the credibility of UFO witnesses and researchers. It features brief references to notable figures in UFO research including military witnesses, scientists, and academics who have made claims about UAP phenomena.

key_claims.claim: Commander David Fravor observed a white Tic Tac looking object just above the surface of the water
A Stanford microbiologist claims to have UFO crash parts with unusual isotope ratios
The wow signal equivalent for UFOs is that people see them on an almost regular basis
UFO phenomena may be manipulating time and space dimensions in ways beyond our science
John Mack was head of the Harvard Psychiatry Department and believed something profoundly important and authentic is occurring with UFO phenomena
